Time of Fructification of the Results of the Fourth House
Each bhava must be studied not in an isolated manner
but as having a bearing on every other part of the
horoscope. This collective approach is absolutely necessary
if we have to understand the true significance of a bhava.
The factors governing the fourth house are (a) the lord,
(6) planet or planets aspecting the fourth house, (c) planet
or planets posited in the fourth, (d) planets aspecting the
lord of the fourth, (e) planet or planets in association with
the lord of the fourth, (f) the lord of the fourth from the
Moon, and (g) the karaka of the fourth bhava.
The factors suggested above may influence the fourth
house, that is give rise to the results of the fourth house, (a)
as lords of Dasas (periods), as lords of Bhuktis (sub-
periods), or as lords of the still minor divisions of the Dasa
scheme. It must be noted that the sub-periods of the planets
